data_description.update_interval: How often to fetch data from the Portal Odbiorcy Enea. Minimum 30 minutes, default 8h 30min.

user.title: Connect to Portal Odbiorcy Enea
user.description: Enter your login credentials for portalodbiorcy.operator.enea.pl

select_meter.title: Select Energy Meter
select_meter.description: Choose the energy meter (PPE) to monitor

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Enea
reauth_confirm.description: Your credentials are no longer valid (e.g. password was changed). Please enter your current login details.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Portal Odbiorcy Enea. Please check your internet connection.

refresh.name: Refresh meter
refresh.description: Manually fetch the latest data from the Portal Odbiorcy Enea. If no device is specified, all configured meters are refreshed.

device_id.name: Device
device_id.description: The meter to refresh. Leave empty to refresh all meters.
